RULE_ROW.RULE_NAME: QOS DELAY only GPRS SERVICE REQUESTED

RULEITEM_ROW.RULEITEM_RESULT: String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_CAMEL_EXT.MSC_ADDRESS)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"30",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_CAMEL_EXT.SERVER_ADDRESS)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"32",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_LOCN_EXT.TRACKING_CUST_INFO.EQUIPMENT.TYPE)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"30",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_LOCN_EXT.TRACKING_CUST_INFO.EQUIPMENT.IDENTIFIER)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"31",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_LOCN_EXT.TRACKED_CUST_INFO.EQUIPMENT.TYPE)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"30",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_LOCN_EXT.TRACKED_CUST_INFO.EQUIPMENT.IDENTIFIER)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"31",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_CONT_EXT.CHARGED_PARTY_INFO.EQUIPMENT.TYPE)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"30",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_CONT_EXT.CHARGED_PARTY_INFO.EQUIPMENT.IDENTIFIER)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"30",tag,depth,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_CAMEL_EXT.SERVICE_KEY)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"33",tag_m,depth_m,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr( edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_CAMEL_EXT.CAMEL_REFERENCE_NUMBER)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET",1,warning,"31",tag_m,depth_m,offset,arrayIndex,ruleID);
String offset = longToStr(edrFieldTokenBytePos(DETAIL.ASS_GPRS_EXT.DEVICE_NUMBER)); edrAddError("ERR_TAP3_RET", intErrCode, tapErrLvl, tapErrCode, tapFldID, depth, offset, arrayIdx, ruleID);
